title: Workshops & Conferences
content: Workshops & Conferences Report of FDP and National Mathematics Day 2025 - Matrix Applications in AI ML, 16-22 December, 2025 Complete Report of NCM Workshop (9th June - 21st June 2025) FDP Report (Data Science in Financial Statistics & Predictive Analysis with R) 22-27 Dec 2024 A Report on One-week Workshop on “Fundamentals of Differential Equations with Applications to Real World Problems” Dates: (8th July -13th July 2024) Two weeks Workshop on "Advanced Topics in Partial Differential Equations", (15-27, May 2023) One-week Advanced Workshop on "Integral Equations - Solvability Analysis and Applications" under the auspices of National Program on Differential Equations: Theory, Computation and Applications (NPDE-TCA) sponsored by DST, Government of India held at Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, Solan during the period October 19-25, 2015 One-week Workshop on `Combinatorics` and Graph Theory in Science and Engineering (CGSE 2014)’‘ at Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, Solan, during November 3-8, 2014. 2nd International Conference on Eco-friendly Computing and Communication Systems (ICECCS)-2013, 17-19 October, 2013 NBHM Supported Advanced Training in Mathematics Workshop (ATMW) in PDE and Mechanics, June 3-15, 2013 NBHM ATM School for Lecturers : June 04-16, 2012 18th International Conference of Forum for Interdisciplinary Mathematics on Interdisciplinary Mathematical and Statistical Techniques (August 2-4, 2009)
